purpose: Gate tier for a verb-form (measure) hover/authoring decision. A form-aware dominant-sense gloss is auto-safe ONLY when the surface key is collision-free and the sense is single; derived-form sense shifts and surface-key collisions escalate.

rules.when: QAC root+POS agree; surface norm_strict key maps to ONE form/meaning in the corpus; single applicable Qamus sense
norm_strict key collides with a different-meaning form of the root (نَزَّلَ→نزل vs نَزَلَ; اِسْتَغْفِرُوا imperative vs perfect)
rules.note: the form-distinguishing shadda/voice is dropped by the key — pending

rules.when: Form II/IV/V/VIII/X sense differs from Form I (نَزَّلَ≠نَزَلَ; عَلَّمَ≠عَلِمَ)
the form is passive (ḍamma-kasra) — wording flips (خُلِقَ 'was created')
a لَمْ/لَنْ governs the verb (tense flips)
